About the artist

TØX!Q

A multidisciplinary artist working across digital and traditional media. My work is a fusion of beauty and decay where memory distorts, color melts, and identity fractures into surreal, living artifacts.

Each piece explores nostalga, time, and transformation while capturing fleeting moments between the synthetic and the human, where emotion becomes image. a texture remembered in childhood, a feeling without a name and where intuition and technique negotiate in the dark.
